response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the entire video for vocal music content. The video features instrumental background music throughout the 3D showcase segment (01:55 - 04:46), but no vocals were detected. Therefore, no web searches for lyrics were required.
response.global_summary: This video is a 3D showcase for the VTuber Raora Panthera. It features an introductory segment followed by a 3D model demonstration accompanied by instrumental background music. No vocal music was identified in the video.

scenes.description: Showcase of the 3D model with instrumental background music playing.
